title_en: 5. Would you like to meet him outside the institution? (cont.)
content_en: He would go to their gatherings and speak to them on the pathways, but they refused to forsake the worshipping of idols. At-Tufayl became angry and left for Makkah to inform the Messenger of Allah . He said, "O Messenger of Allah, Daws have disobeyed and refused to accept Islam. O Messenger of Allah, supplicate to Allah against them!" The Prophet's facial complexion changed and he raised his hands to supplicate. At-Tufayl saw this and thought to himself that Daws would now be destroyed, yet, the Prophet of mercy Supplications said instead, "O Allah, guide Daws! O Allah, guide Daws!" He then turned to at-Tufayl and said, "Go back to your people and call them to Islam with gentleness." He returned to them and continued to call them to Islam until they ﬁnally accepted. How beautiful it is to knock on heaven's doors, not only for at-Tufayl and his people but many others besides them. The Muslims at the beginning of the Islamic call were very few, perhaps, not more than thirty-eight men. One day, Abu Bakr suggested that the Messenger of Allah proclaim his message openly to the people and declare openly his Islam. The Prophet replied, "O Abu Bakr, we are few in number." Abu Bakr was very eager, so he persisted until they decided to do as he had suggested. They went out with the Prophet leading them and headed for the Grand Mosque. There they dispersed, every one of them addressing his own people. Abu Bakr stood up and began to address his people, call them to Islam, and attack their idols. The pagans rose against the Muslims and began to beat them all over the mosque. As the pagans were many in number, the Muslims dispersed. Meanwhile, a group of pagans ganged up against Abu Bakr and beat him until he fell to the ground. Thereupon, the evil 'Utbah bin Rabi'ah came closer to Abu Bakr and began to strike him with his sandals and rub them against his face. He then stood on top of Abu Bakr's stomach while blood was pouring from his face. The ﬂesh on his face became apparent and his mouth had became indistinguishable from his nose. Supplications Meanwhile, men from Abu Taym, who were the tribe of Abu Bakr, arrived on the scene and pushed people away from Abu Bakr. They then carried him on a sheet of cloth and took him home. They thought he had passed away. Banu Taym then returned to the mosque and began to shout, "By Allah, If Abu Bakr dies, we will surely kill 'Utbah bin Rabi'ah!" They then returned to Abu Bakr who was unconscious, not knowing whether he was dead or alive. Abu Quhafah, Abu Bakr's father, stood next to Abu Bakr along with his family, trying to speak to him, but he wouldn't respond. His mother was also standing next to him weeping. After a long while, he opened up his eyes, and the ﬁrst thing he said was,"What happened to the Messenger of Allah?" May Allah have mercy on Abu Bakr! He was full of love for the Messenger of Allah , such that he feared for him more than he feared for his own life. All those around him, including his father, mother and his people, who were all pagans, became angry and began to curse the Messenger of Allah . They then left and told the mother of Abu Bakr to give him something to eat or drink. His mother began to console him as he kept repeating, "What happened to the Messenger of Allah?" She said, "By Allah, I don't know what happened to your friend." He said, "Please, go to Umm Jameel bint al-Khattab and ask her about him." Umm Jameel was a Muslim who would conceal her Islam. His mother visited Umm Jameel and asked, "Abu Bakr is asking about Supplications Muhammad bin 'Abdullah. Do you have any news?" She said, "I neither know Abu Bakr nor Muhammad bin 'Abdullah, but do you want me to go with you to your son?" 'Yes", she replied. She went with her until they approached Abu Bakr. She found him lying on his bed with his face disﬁgured and his body fatigued. When Umm Jameel saw him, she screamed, "Did the people do this to you only to defend the people of wickedness and disbelief? I really hope Allah exacts revenge from them!" Abu Bakr then turned to her with his drained eyes, fatigued body, disﬁgured face, and a heart full of love for this religion, and said, "What happened to the Messenger of Allah ?" Umm Abu Bakr was standing next to her and Umm Jameel feared that she might be exposed for her Islam and thereafter abused.
content_id: Ia mendatangi perkumpulan mereka dan berbicara kepada mereka di jalan-jalan, namun mereka menolak untuk meninggalkan penyembahan berhala. At-Tufayl menjadi marah dan berangkat ke Makkah untuk memberitahu Rasulullah. Ia berkata, "Wahai Rasulullah, Daws telah membangkang dan menolak untuk menerima Islam. Wahai Rasulullah, berdoalah kepada Allah untuk membinasakan mereka!" Raut wajah Nabi berubah dan beliau mengangkat kedua tangannya untuk berdoa. At-Tufayl melihat ini dan berpikir dalam dirinya bahwa Daws kini akan dibinasakan, namun Nabi yang penuh rahmat itu justru bersabda, "Ya Allah, berilah petunjuk kepada Daws! Ya Allah, berilah petunjuk kepada Daws!" Beliau kemudian berpaling kepada at-Tufayl dan berkata, "Kembalilah kepada kaummu dan ajaklah mereka kepada Islam dengan lemah lembut." Ia kembali kepada mereka dan terus mengajak mereka kepada Islam hingga akhirnya mereka menerimanya. Betapa indahnya mengetuk pintu-pintu langit, bukan hanya untuk at-Tufayl dan kaumnya tetapi juga banyak orang lain di luar mereka. Kaum Muslim pada awal seruan Islam sangatlah sedikit, mungkin tidak lebih dari tiga puluh delapan orang. Suatu hari, Abu Bakar menyarankan agar Rasulullah menyampaikan pesannya secara terbuka kepada orang-orang dan menyatakan keislamannya secara terang-terangan. Nabi menjawab, "Wahai Abu Bakar, kita sedikit jumlahnya." Abu Bakar sangat bersemangat, sehingga ia terus mendesak hingga mereka memutuskan untuk melakukan sebagaimana yang ia sarankan. Mereka keluar dengan Nabi memimpin mereka dan menuju Masjidil Haram. Di sana mereka berpencar, masing-masing berbicara kepada kaumnya sendiri. Abu Bakar berdiri dan mulai berbicara kepada kaumnya, mengajak mereka kepada Islam, dan menyerang berhala-berhala mereka. Orang-orang musyrik bangkit melawan kaum Muslim dan mulai memukuli mereka di seluruh penjuru masjid. Karena orang-orang musyrik jumlahnya banyak, kaum Muslim pun berpencar. Sementara itu, sekelompok orang musyrik bekerja sama menyerang Abu Bakar dan memukulinya hingga ia jatuh ke tanah. Kemudian, si jahat 'Utbah bin Rabi'ah mendekati Abu Bakar dan mulai memukulnya dengan sandalnya dan menggosokkan sandalnya ke wajahnya. Ia kemudian berdiri di atas perut Abu Bakar sementara darah mengalir dari wajahnya. Daging di wajahnya terlihat dan mulutnya tidak bisa dibedakan dari hidungnya. Sementara itu, orang-orang dari Banu Taym, suku Abu Bakar, tiba di tempat kejadian dan mendorong orang-orang menjauh dari Abu Bakar. Mereka kemudian membawanya di atas selembar kain dan membawanya pulang ke rumah. Mereka mengira ia telah meninggal dunia. Banu Taym kemudian kembali ke masjid dan mulai berteriak, "Demi Allah, jika Abu Bakar meninggal, kami pasti akan membunuh 'Utbah bin Rabi'ah!" Mereka kemudian kembali kepada Abu Bakar yang dalam keadaan tidak sadarkan diri, tidak tahu apakah ia masih hidup atau sudah meninggal. Abu Quhafah, ayah Abu Bakar, berdiri di samping Abu Bakar beserta keluarganya, mencoba berbicara kepadanya, tetapi ia tidak merespons. Ibunya juga berdiri di sampingnya sambil menangis. Setelah waktu yang lama, ia membuka matanya, dan hal pertama yang ia katakan adalah, "Apa yang terjadi dengan Rasulullah?" Semoga Allah merahmati Abu Bakar! Ia dipenuhi cinta kepada Rasulullah, sehingga ia lebih mengkhawatirkan beliau daripada mengkhawatirkan nyawanya sendiri. Semua orang di sekitarnya, termasuk ayah, ibu, dan kaumnya, yang semuanya adalah orang musyrik, menjadi marah dan mulai mencaci-maki Rasulullah. Mereka kemudian pergi dan memberitahu ibu Abu Bakar untuk memberinya sesuatu untuk dimakan atau diminum. Ibunya mulai menghiburnya sementara ia terus mengulangi, "Apa yang terjadi dengan Rasulullah?" Ia berkata, "Demi Allah, aku tidak tahu apa yang terjadi dengan temanmu." Ia berkata, "Tolong, pergilah ke Umm Jamil bint al-Khattab dan tanyakan tentangnya." Umm Jamil adalah seorang Muslimah yang menyembunyikan keislamannya. Ibunya mengunjungi Umm Jamil dan bertanya, "Abu Bakar menanyakan tentang Muhammad bin Abdullah. Apakah kamu memiliki kabar tentangnya?" Ia berkata, "Aku tidak mengenal Abu Bakar maupun Muhammad bin Abdullah, tetapi apakah kamu ingin aku pergi bersamamu kepada putramu?" "Ya," ia menjawab. Ia pergi bersamanya hingga mereka mendekati Abu Bakar. Ia mendapatinya berbaring di tempat tidurnya dengan wajah yang cacat dan tubuh yang kelelahan. Ketika Umm Jamil melihatnya, ia berteriak, "Apakah orang-orang melakukan ini kepadamu hanya untuk membela orang-orang yang fasik dan kafir? Aku benar-benar berharap Allah membalas mereka!" Abu Bakar kemudian berpaling kepadanya dengan mata yang lelah, tubuh yang kelelahan, wajah yang cacat, dan hati yang penuh cinta terhadap agama ini, dan berkata, "Apa yang terjadi dengan Rasulullah?" Umm Abu Bakar sedang berdiri di sampingnya dan Umm Jamil khawatir bahwa ia mungkin akan terungkap karena keislamannya dan setelah itu dianiaya.
